info.name: Needhomes API Doc
info.description:
NeedHomes backend API. Import into a Postman workspace named "Needhomes API Doc".

Folders: Public —, Account —, Investor —, Partner —, Admin —, Shared —

1. Import the environment file and select it.
2. Run Account — Authentication > Login to set accessToken.
3. Partner routes: login with a partner account.
4. Admin routes: login with an admin account.

Base URL: {{baseUrl}} (default http://localhost:3000)
API prefix: /api

item.name: Public — Marketplace
item.description: Published property catalog and resale listings

request.description: Deep-link / partner referral landing pages use slug instead of UUID.

item.name: Account — Authentication
item.description: Signup, login, and password recovery (all roles)

request.description: Saves accessToken and refreshToken to collection variables
Sets status to deactivated and revokes push tokens. User can contact support to reactivate.
Soft-deletes the account and anonymizes profile data. Blocked when wallet balance, active investments, or pending exits/resales exist.

item.name: Investor — KYC
item.description: Identity verification for investors and partners

request.description: photoBase64 must be a real base64-encoded selfie in production.
Provider callback. Set header x-qoreid-signature to HMAC SHA512 of raw body using QOREID_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

item.name: Investor — Notifications
item.description: In-app notifications and push token registration

item.name: Investor — Portfolio
item.description: Checkout, portfolio, installments. Outright checkout returns status completed; list/detail include propertyImageUrl.

request.description: Returns base64 PDF receipt for all investment types.
Returns base64 PDF certificate. Fails with 400 for outright purchases.

item.name: Investor — Wallet
item.description: Balances, top-up, withdraw, bank accounts, PIN

request.description: Poll Paystack after checkout. Requires PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY and a completed Paystack payment.
Simulates Paystack charge.success. Set header x-paystack-signature to HMAC SHA512 of the raw JSON body using PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY.

item.name: Partner — Commissions
item.description: Partner commission wallet, analytics, and payouts (requires partner JWT)

item.name: Admin — Team
item.description: Admin team members and module access (super-admin for most routes)
